en_title: Destiny 2 Fans Plan Mass Protest to 'Crash the Servers' and Beat Marathon's All-Time Player Record
cn_title: 《命运2》玩家策划涌入服务器抗议Bungie停服

paragraphs.cn: 更新时间：2026年5月27日 15:56 UTC（北京时间5月27日23:56）

paragraphs.en: Destiny 2 fans distraught over Bungie's decision to end support for the franchise are planning to try and "crash the servers" to demonstrate that there's still huge interest in the game.
paragraphs.cn: 因Bungie宣布终止该系列内容更新而深感失望的《命运2》粉丝们，正策划一场「挤爆服务器」的行动，以此向官方表明这款游戏仍有巨大的玩家热情。

paragraphs.en: In a lengthy thread on reddit, Destiny fan w1nds0r has issued a call to arms for all Destiny players to return on June 9, when the game's final ever content drop arrives.
paragraphs.cn: 在Reddit的一条长帖中，《命运》系列玩家w1nds0r号召所有玩家在6月9日——本作最终内容更新上线之日——一起回归。

paragraphs.en: Bungie stunned fans last week with the announcement it was ending content updates for Destiny 2 to focus instead on its more recently-released extraction shooter Marathon, which has reportedly failed to meet sales expectations. Subsequent reporting has suggested that no Destiny sequel is currently in the works, and that Bungie is also now set for "significant" layoffs.
paragraphs.cn: Bungie上周震惊玩家圈，宣布将停止《命运2》的内容更新，转而把精力投入到此前发售但据报销量未达预期的撤离类射击游戏《失落星船：马拉松》上。后续报道指出，《命运》系列续作目前并未处于开发中，并且Bungie即将进行「重大规模」裁员。

paragraphs.en: "We need to at least smash Marathon's all time high to show them they made the wrong decision," w1nds0r wrote, suggesting that this would show Sony that Destiny remains "a franchise worth continuing to invest in... It's our last chance to send a message the franchise is still valuable." (Marathon launched in March with a Steam peak of 77,358 players. Its daily peak is now hovering around 10,000 players.)
paragraphs.cn: 「我们至少要打破《失落星船：马拉松》的历史峰值，让他们看看自己做错了决定。」w1nds0r写道。他认为此举可向索尼证明《命运》仍然是「值得继续投入的IP……这是我们最后一次发出声音、表明这个系列仍有价值的机会」。（《失落星船：马拉松》于3月发售，Steam历史峰值为77,358人。如今每日峰值在1万人左右徘徊。）

paragraphs.en: More than 1,000 responses to w1nds0r's post all say pretty much the same thing: that Destiny fans are still keen to return one last time to wander its Tower, go forth in missions across the surface of alien worlds, or just sit in orbit and chat for hours.
paragraphs.cn: w1nds0r的帖子下涌现的1,000多条回复几乎异口同声：《命运》玩家依然渴望最后一次回归——再到塔楼里逛逛、再到外星世界表面执行任务，或者只是停在轨道上闲聊几个小时。

paragraphs.en: "Haven't played since The Final Shape, but I'll be there," wrote one fan, JulioTheBoi. "I need to give this game one last hurrah so that we don't go quietly into the dying of the light."
paragraphs.cn: 「自《最终形态》之后我就没玩了，但我会回来的。」一位名叫JulioTheBoi的玩家写道，「我得给这游戏来一次最后的狂欢，免得我们就这样静悄悄地走向终焉。」

paragraphs.en: "S*** I'm gonna reinstall just for that, f*** em," replied izzbot. Added Hungry_Document_2385: "Crash the servers."
paragraphs.cn: 「我d，我专门为这个重装回去，去他m的。」名为izzbot的玩家回复。Hungry_Document_2385也补充：「挤爆服务器。」

paragraphs.en: Of course, Sony is likely expecting an influx of players on June 9, since it has already announced plans to put Destiny 2 into PlayStation Plus Extra and Premier tiers on the day it receives its final update. The Destiny 2: Legacy Collection (2025), including The Final Shape expansion, will be available for Extra and Premium/Deluxe members, though some earlier expansions will remain paywalled.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，索尼大概率已经预料到6月9日会有大量玩家回流——他们此前已宣布，将在《命运2》最终更新当日把该游戏加入PlayStation Plus Extra及Premier会员阵容。包含《最终形态》扩展包的《命运2：传承合集（2025）》将提供给Extra和Premium/Deluxe会员，但部分早期扩展包仍需另购解锁。

paragraphs.en: As the dust settles on last week's bombshell news, the Destiny community has begun bidding their farewells to the franchise, as word surfaces that the "vast majority" of Bungie staff were unaware of the plan to ditch the game until the news broke. In the days since, fans have taken to the Marathon Steam page to make their frustrations clear by leaving negative reviews, even as others have begun combating these reviews through a positive countercampaign.
paragraphs.cn: 在上周这则重磅消息引发的震动逐渐平息之际，《命运》玩家社区已经开始陆续向这一系列道别。与此同时，有消息称Bungie「绝大多数」员工在新闻发布之前都对这一停止开发的决定毫不知情。新闻发布之后的几天里，玩家纷纷涌入《失落星船：马拉松》的Steam页面，用差评表达不满，也有玩家以正面好评进行反向声援。

paragraphs.en: A petition calling for Sony to greenlight Destiny 3 continues to amass signatures, meanwhile, with more than 265,000 fans now calling for a third game in the franchise to be made.
paragraphs.cn: 另一边，呼吁索尼立项《命运3》的请愿活动还在持续征集签名，目前已有超过265,000名粉丝联名要求开发该系列的第三部作品。
